summary:
The “needle” was that the v2 API response dropped three fields (avatar_url, bio, location) that exist in v1, breaking backward-compatibility.  

Fix applied:

1. app/models.go  
   • Added the missing fields to UserV2 struct.  
   • Updated the comment to stress the backward-compatibility rule.  
   • Updated (*InternalUser).ToV2 so it populates every field, including the restored ones.

All tests now pass:

$ ./test.sh
PASS: v2 API is backward-compatible with v1
